overview: The design contains a single independent component with no dependencies, so the entire implementation fits in one phase. The todo-api service encapsulates all required functionality including the new bulk-delete endpoint.

phases.name: Foundation Service
phases.description: Single self-contained Go service implementing the Todo API with bulk-delete support.

components.name: todo-api
responsibilities: Expose Todo CRUD REST endpoints with bearer-token auth and per-user ownership
Implement POST /todos/bulk-delete with atomic, idempotent, classified deletion (deleted/notFound/forbidden)
Validate input (1-100 UUIDs, dedupe) and return structured error responses
Apply per-user token-bucket rate limiting on write endpoints and CORS handling
Provide /health endpoint and structured stdout logging of bulk operations
components.architectureContext: Stateless single-service backend serving HTTP clients directly on port 9090. No upstream/downstream services; uses in-memory thread-safe storage. All API requirements (existing + bulk-delete) are fulfilled here.
keyConsiderations: Use a single sync.RWMutex around the map for the bulk-delete critical section to ensure atomic classify-then-delete with rollback on failure
Silently de-duplicate input IDs before classification; document in OpenAPI
Treat bearer token as userId stub; 401 when missing; consistent {code,message,details} error format across all 4xx/5xx
Token-bucket rate limiter keyed by userId (~60 req/min) on POST/DELETE/bulk-delete returning 429
Multi-stage Docker build to distroless/static, EXPOSE 9090; log requester + sorted IDs + outcome counts for each bulk delete
components.apiContract:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo API
  version: 1.1.0
  description: Todo management API with bulk delete support.
servers:
  - url: http://localhost:9090
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
  /todos:
    get:
      summary: List todos for authenticated user
      security: [{BearerAuth: []}]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Todo'}
    post:
      summary: Create a todo
      security: [{BearerAuth: []}]
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/TodoInput'}
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Todo'}
  /todos/{id}:
    get:
      summary: Get a todo
      security: [{BearerAuth: []}]
      parameters:
        - {name: id, in: path, required: true, schema: {type: string, format: uuid}}
      responses:
        '200': {description: OK, content: {application/json: {schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Todo'}}}}
        '404': {description: Not found}
    delete:
      summary: Delete a todo
      security: [{BearerAuth: []}]
      parameters:
        - {name: id, in: path, required: true, schema: {type: string, format: uuid}}
      responses:
        '204': {description: Deleted}
        '403': {description: Forbidden}
        '404': {description: Not found}
  /todos/bulk-delete:
    post:
      summary: Bulk delete todos
      description: Deletes up to 100 todos in one request. De-duplicates IDs silently. Returns per-item result.
      security: [{BearerAuth: []}]
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/BulkDeleteRequest'}
      responses:
        '200':
          description: At least one deletion succeeded or all were no-ops on valid input
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/BulkDeleteResponse'}
        '400': {description: Invalid request, content: {application/json: {schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'}}}}
        '401': {description: Unauthenticated}
        '429': {description: Rate limited}
components:
  securitySchemes:
    BearerAuth: {type: http, scheme: bearer}
  schemas:
    Todo:
      type: object
      properties:
        id: {type: string, format: uuid}
        ownerId: {type: string}
        title: {type: string}
        completed: {type: boolean}
        createdAt: {type: string, format: date-time}
    TodoInput:
      type: object
      required: [title]
      properties:
        title: {type: string}
        completed: {type: boolean}
    BulkDeleteRequest:
      type: object
      required: [ids]
      properties:
        ids:
          type: array
          minItems: 1
          maxItems: 100
          items: {type: string, format: uuid}
    BulkDeleteResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        deletedCount: {type: integer}
        deleted: {type: array, items: {type: string, format: uuid}}
        notFound: {type: array, items: {type: string, format: uuid}}
        forbidden: {type: array, items: {type: string, format: uuid}}
    Error:
      type: object
      properties:
        code: {type: string}
        message: {type: string}
        details: {type: object, additionalProperties: true}
